body:
Dear Anthony,

Attached is a file containing information for construction projects in Los Angeles County.  That information includes names, phone numbers, and addresses for contractors, owners, architects, and more.  You can utilize that data for a three-pronged sales and marketing approach to increase your conversions.  Feel free to use those leads to gain additional business and learn about the people ready to purchase in your market right now.

Since 1989, Construction Monitor has been collecting building permits from municipalities around the United States.  We collect and database tens of thousands of permits every single week to provide construction professionals a way to increase their sales and forecast future business.

In addition to these leads, you can also have 24/7 access to our website which includes great tools to find the exact projects and statistics you need.  I would be happy to give you a website demonstration anytime on how to use our service in the following ways:

Bid on current projects
Track top contractors and construction trends
Locate owner-builders working on their own projects
Pinpoint your potential customers
Get an edge on your competition

You can view our brochure here to learn more on your own time, and also feel free to review our website.

Thanks for your time and I look forward to future correspondence.

Sincerely,

Colleen Johnson
Construction Monitor
colleen.johnson@constructionmonitor.com
https://www.constructionmonitor.com
Office: (435) 267-0463 119
Fax: (435) 586-7414

Get Pricing and Subscribe Today!

Colleen Johnson

Construction Monitor
(435) 267-0463
colleen.johnson@constructionmonitor.com

www.constructionmonitor.com

subject: EDD
snippet: Dear Mr. DiMarcello:  Thank you for keeping me updated.  I'm continuing to seek an update or elaboration on your situation from EDD, please wait for that.  Can you please comment on the claim which is currently valid for you and what the payout from EDD is and its status?  Thanks,  Marshal
body:
Dear Mr. DiMarcello:

Thank you for keeping me updated.

I'm continuing to seek an update or elaboration on your situation from EDD, please wait for that.

Can you please comment on the claim which is currently valid for you and what the payout from EDD is and its status?

Thanks,

Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant
San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein

subject: RE: EDD
snippet: Dear Mr. DiMarcello, my contact at the EDD is currently unavailable until the 9th of this month but I will be trying to see what we can achieve in the mean time.  Thanks,  Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein  From: A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gma
body:
Dear Mr. DiMarcello, my contact at the EDD is currently unavailable until the 9th of this month but I will be trying to see what we can achieve in the mean time.

Thanks,

Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant
San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein

From: A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com>
Sent: Tuesday, May 3, 2022 6:24 PM
To: Wu, Marshall (Feinstein) <Marshall_Wu@feinstein.senate.gov>
Subject: Re: EDD

Ya know bc I’m basically going to starve in a hardship unless now I call EDD and do whatever they say so I can get some money and eat.

I’ve been part of the coastal community for a long time and worked with a lot of prominent people here on a personal level.

My reputation and career are intertwined, I cannot even entertain any work bc of this situation. The few associates in this community that I was not able to hide this from have lent me money over the year and resources and are promising to keep this private,
They have been following along for me to pay them back and their interest in this has evolved to be much more attentive as this gets worse and worse.

I have paid quite the price to be discreet and follow EDD and ID.me through this process over the last year.

Please have this matter cleared up and my unemployment released asap before this gets worse and so I can begin to slowly piece my life and career back together. And also figure out what exactly is going on here, bc no one seems to understand the events over the last year and my sons security and mine is clearly at risk. This is an urgent matter.

Anthony

On Tue, May 3, 2022 at 5:57 PM A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com<mailto:amd949609@gmail.com>> wrote:
Thank You Mr. Wu,

I have had my acct verified several times last week that there was no fraud but that the acct EDD has is not my acct.  I have been in this process for a year since I have been laid off. I updated the Senators office last week that the acct is not mine, your office sent an edd rep that clearly was prepared to do whatever it took to get me to accept the acct is mine, and I denied. I reported back to you after, that was last week.
You told me then to call back regarding just that situation next weds, tomorrow.
Now, mysteriously my food stamps is cutoff.
The only resource I have left.
I am in a hardship.
So I am forced to call the EDD rep you sent me an accept whatever her offer was, which wasn’t regarding my acct.

Our scheduled meeting regarding the EDD rep is tomorrow.  My birthday.
I was reminded of my birthday by the CONTRACTED ebt food stamp case worker doing research and was the only person calling me this week. Her file has my Birthday correct, but no other details. She promised like everyone else to get me out of this before it gets worse.  And she promised she has the details I gave her and they won’t be lost. Right.

It’s been a year since my layoff and I filed my unemployment claim.

EDD still has not sent me my UI from that claim.

My uncle is in a coma from a life threatening car accident that happened last week, and if he does make it through and wake up, he may be paralyzed.
My family is distraught and I cannot focus on that bc I am waiting for MY ENTIRE LIFE AND CAREER TO POTENTIALLY BE RESTORED BC I AM IN A HARDSHIP.

If EDD can just offer me whatever they like, how about they just offer me my unemployment I filed for  from when I was laid off last year in May.

Thank you for your offices time and help with this.

When my family members that are officers are available again, bc they are clearly with our uncle,
I will be able to inform them of what’s going on and see if they can be of assistance. But as usual, like for the last year, I’m waiting to survive and all of this has been completely out of my hands.

Anthony


On Tue, May 3, 2022 at 5:31 PM Wu, Marshall (Feinstein) <Marshall_Wu@feinstein.senate.gov<mailto:Marshall_Wu@feinstein.senate.gov>> wrote:
Dear Mr. DiMarcello:

Thank you for keeping me updated.

I’m continuing to seek an update or elaboration on your situation from EDD, please wait for that.

Can you please comment on the claim which is currently valid for you and what the payout from EDD is and its status?

Thanks,

Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant
San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein

So the update for today is what you sent?

Please clarify,
Thank you.

On Mon, May 9, 2022 at 10:51 AM A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com<mailto:amd949609@gmail.com>> wrote:
With all due respect I cannot track or confirm or deny information that is not on my acct, or the claim I filed when I was laid off. I am in a hardship and my information was detailed in my claim at the time of filing. I do not have resources in a hardship to recreate my claim and I can only comment on my claim and my acct, which EDD does not have anymore.

Please Advise.

Thank you,
Anthony

Anthony

On Mon, May 9, 2022 at 10:30 AM Wu, Marshall (Feinstein) <Marshall_Wu@feinstein.senate.gov<mailto:Marshall_Wu@feinstein.senate.gov>> wrote:
Dear Mr. DiMarcello:

Were you made aware of these two events?

“Mr. Marcello is current with regards weekly certifications. Week ending 04/23 & 04/30 are processing as of 05/04/22. Please allow 24-48hr processing to account.”

“The current claim is valid and the two payments are processing. The payments take 24-48 hours to completely process. Mr. Dimarcello will continue to fill out the weekly certifications. Telephone call to Mr. Dimarcello. After a lengthy conversation with the information matches his work history and last day worked. As well as the two claims filed: One filed on 03/29/20 is the covid claim which ended on 09/04/21. The claim 02/06/22 is the current valid claim. The department cannot backdate a claim when weeks were paid out on a previous claim. Mr. Dimarcello, insists he filed a claim in May 2021.”

Thanks,

Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant
San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein

body:
Dear Mr. DiMarcello:

Were you made aware of these two events?

“Mr. Marcello is current with regards weekly certifications. Week ending 04/23 & 04/30 are processing as of 05/04/22. Please allow 24-48hr processing to account.”

subject: RE: EDD , Anthony DiMarcello
snippet: Dear Mr. DiMarcello:  There are two specific issues I believe that would be helpful to raise you at this time.  I spoke with our EDD liaison and EDD needs proof of documentation for your federal PUA. I hope that you would be able to resolve this problem, however you would need to provide that do
body:
Dear Mr. DiMarcello:

There are two specific issues I believe that would be helpful to raise you at this time.

I spoke with our EDD liaison and EDD needs proof of documentation for your federal PUA. I hope that you would be able to resolve this problem, however you would need to provide that documentation first. I would even be happy to provide that documentation to EDD on your behalf if you can forward that.

On APR 11, a final overpayment notice was issued to you to advise you of potential overpayment. The case has already been adjudicated and unfortunately you would now need to appeal to an administrative judge to reverse the decision, even if the cause was a small mistake. I would encourage you to locate the documentation as soon as possible.

In the case that you believe your identity may have been stolen as there is a claim which has been made with the same information as yours, it would be necessary for you to begin an ID verification process in order to deal with the problematic claim which has been filed with your information, although this process would halt your UI payments until resolved.

I am happy to offer assistance where I can, but unfortunately this does not apply to legal matters as our office cannot take action there. We would only be able to point you to local law enforcement for the other difficulties which you are facing.

Thanks,

Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant
San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein

I have not heard from my partner, I hope you can help him get secure so he can help gather my work As well.

I have to also move onto my other complaints I reached out to the Senator for.

My landlord collected on my rental relief and
had me evicted at gun point. My landlord broke several more laws around the Rental Relief program, beyond the payment fraud of myself and the Government program. I have been in fear of my sons security bc we shared my very nice and very safe apartment. It was rated the best place to raise a child in the USA. They do not deserve that title, at all.

Please advise

Anthony

body:
Mr. DiMarcello,



Thank you for your email to the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD). Based on the information provided, you have a case filed with Department of Fair Employment and Housing. Please note, the Department of Fair Employment and Housing (DFEH) is administered with the state of California.



You may check the status of your pending DFEH complaint:

  *   Online
     *   If you already have an online account in our California Civil Rights System (CCRS), simply click on your DFEH case number.
     *   If you do not have an online account yet, it’s easy! To create an account, all you need is a valid email address and phone number. Once you create your account, and log in, you will see a list of the cases you have with DFEH. Click on the case you would like information on.
  *   By phone or email
     *   Call the staff member handling your case. If you have lost that information, or need other help regarding a specific matter, contact us<https://www.dfeh.ca.gov/ContactUs>.



If you have any questions or need assistance with the complaint inquiry filed with HUD’s Office of Fair Housing and Equal Opportunity (FHEO), please email ComplaintsOffice09@hud.gov<mailto:ComplaintsOffice09@hud.gov>.

The Los Angeles Office of Public Housing (LAOPH)
U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)

I knew or pursued it.

They almost killed me and my high profile patient staying with me.



I have barely seen my son Since last May and my disabled mother is still in Mexico after I had to pull her from her treatments at Hoag in Newport for Congestive Heart Failure.

That’s where my son was born and my local hospital. Besides the fact that Bill Gross himself would be appreciative of my work with the bond Markets during the recession. And the integrity of the Commodity Markets during the chaos of The Great Recession.



That’s the threat, do you understand??

Is it clear now??

I tried for months to back down everyone abs let me focus on my work and my career and not pursue this since April 23rd.

On a small level Sheas petty managers wanted to kick me out and keep my rental relief money and flip my badass home that I negotiated very well at the bottom of the market.

BC THATS MY PROFESSION AS A BROKER.

To negotiate buying a dip. That’s it.

Negotiations from a position of strength.



When Shea and their wave of greed came to my shores I was knee deep in my layoff from being a technical designer during Covid.

For custom coastal homes in Orange County.

For years, the laid off.

I caught Covid doing essential services

I barely got paid.

I didn’t stop regardless of money

Regardless of the abuse that even my young son took like a champ with me in his own way.

(more for Hollywood)



I didn’t just do the fraudulent rework plagued crap every other high end designer and contractor does around here.



I developed prop systems and coded prop software. Bc the top designers and GCs in OC ALL USED ME FOR THEIR WORK.



I did it so I could help WEALTHY AND PROMINENT ORANGE RESIDENTS THAT WERE BEGGING ME TO GET THE SANITATION RELATED DESIGN WORK DONE SO THEY COULD LEAVE POSH HOTELS AND GET HOME BC SOMEONE IN THEIR FAMILY COUKD DIE FROM COVID.



I don’t need money to do that work

I’ll do all this again twice for the same reasons

And ill wear gasoline shorts and run through

Hundreds of miles of fire hell and brimstone

To do it again.



Bc I’m from Trenton NJ, and if you don’t know your American history, then you won’t understand why it’s important to me.

Trenton Makes The World Takes

(Across the Delaware)



Today I spent hours calling every agency I could think of to report everything, finally.



Not a call back, couldn’t get to anyone regarding my civil rights case or to even give all this to anyone to help me and my son.



Been like this all year and much worse.



It was well documented.



Now, Cali and NJ got all this surplus money and no one is held hostage anymore to the people that pay the most in taxes, right?



Y’all got enough tax money to hold up justice and civil rights, correct?



Good bc my partner in NJ and I helped make sure every house we touched was Bella for max appraisal, max resale, our home designs were recognized as the highest rentals along this coast in the OC.



I hope we’re all clear now. Here’s my damages.



Get my partner Dean here to California safely so he can stop being attacked and we can rebuild the damages to my records of my work and who owes us for

THE IRS AND CHILD SUPPORT



AND MAKE SURE THESE CRONIES THAT ATTACKED MY PARTNER DO NOT KILL OUR DOG, TECH.

THEY ARE GOING TO KILL THE DOG TO SILENCE MY PARTNER.



AND I NEED A PHONE CALL FROM SOMEONE WITH AUTHORITY TO GET

MY SONS SECURITY

AND MY MOMS SECURITY

AND MY SONS MOMS SECURITY

AND DEANS SECURITY

AND TECH THE DOGS SECURITY

ALL MADE WHOLE AGAIN THE WAY I HAD IT AND WORKED MY LIFE FOR TO GET

AND I NEED EVERYTHING IN WRITING.



I have been homeless for a year,



My son and I have been stripped of more rights that you can imagine, and even by

MAJOR INSTITUTIONS.



I’m not telling anyone anything more until we are made secure again. And I want our security setup the way I setup our security before these criminals decided to take a bridge too far and forced themselves into my private life.



Where I’m from we call it Wrong Porch.



But I’ve been here on the OC Coast for 15 years and would rather be as civil as I can, as humble as I can, without losing my education on the streets way before I landed here to help my disabled Mom 15 years ago and found much success.



These criminals will not take my success.



They had me stuck in a box for a year and on the streets to protect my son bc it was the only way.



Now that the state is rich again and the high taxes I really love paying for their services back, THANK GOD, can y’all handle these criminal assholes please and get me my families life restored.



I broke my back since I was 15 and rose from a warzone to get what they took from my family,



Y’all can def come visit MLK BLVD , Trenton NJ with me if you wanna see what y’all will

never

ever ever ever

Have to face to get to this email like I did.

And I appreciate every cracked slab of that street , and every person that survived it with me and even more so the majority that are already dead I grew up with that didn’t survive.



Todays Cali OC PCH HB sun hitting me as I woke up in a sleeping bag, in a car, even after all my success and having these scurfs take it, it still makes it worth it to the ones I know that didn’t make it even this far. It’s still heaven compared to what we dealt with back home.

I came alone. They didn’t make it.



So just to have survived this and kept my family safe from these greedy low life’s, right now it’s all good, it’s up to y’all to make this right. I did my part for those close to me first.

Professionalism of my Partner Dean who worked on historical Princeton homes that couldn’t spare rework or mistakes, including

Albert Einsteins home, which Dean meticulously restored.



So, please, help me get back to security for my son and my family and close friends that need me, and let me get back to helping the mentally Ill and disabled, here in OC, that are starting to get suicidal bc I’m not around. I am not exaggerating. It’s well documented.



And then once those that depend on me are settled, maybe I’ll take off a day or two.



I’ve been homeless for a year bc of these criminals and their stupid deal, all of my wisdom teeth are breaking my molars. I’m handling this as best as I can, it can kill me.



And I don’t think you want me to get more aggressive and really panic, right?

Because I can dig real deep.

I grew up as a plumber digging frozen dirt with my father since I was five.

Anthony Michael DiMarcello III

subject: RE: Ok I’m pulling myself together.
snippet: Mr. DiMarcello,  It has been tough for you the past year but we must reiterate that we can only help you within the bounds of the law. We know roughly what had happened to you, but could you rely on your family to assist you in this situation? We find that it would be more helpful for you to be ab
body:
Mr. DiMarcello,

It has been tough for you the past year but we must reiterate that we can only help you within the bounds of the law. We know roughly what had happened to you, but could you rely on your family to assist you in this situation? We find that it would be more helpful for you to be able to stabilize your situation first. You sound like you are not in the greatest state to be able to enumerate a case to the Bar or FBI for the time being.

Thanks,

Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant
San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein

From: A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com>
Sent: Thursday, August 4, 2022 10:04 PM
To: Wu, Marshall (Feinstein) <Marshall_Wu@feinstein.senate.gov>
Subject: Ok I’m pulling myself together.

Tomorrow I’m going to city hall, OC superior court

If I don’t get Justice

I am taking my clean record and experience
To the military.

Then I’m studying politics.

I may be afraid or nervous but I will never run from bullies or anyone doing what these people are doing to me. And I will stop them from ever doing it again. All of them.
Legally and paid in full.
They will have to answer for this.

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely
Anthony Michael DiMarcello III

On Wed, Sep 13, 2023, 9:07 PM Anthony DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com>
wrote:

> What am I missing?
>
> After two years of watching everything I built for my son get torn to
> shreds, and to not even be able to be near him to comfort him through this
> bc of the unknown threat, to this day... this is ok for my son to learn as
> acceptable and nothing about hard work and the law?
>
> What am I missing?
>
> To be homeless for two years instantly, by surprise, and forced out of my
> work and home at gun point, bc criminals manipulated the whole system to
> rob me and the IRS and the futures markets, and this isn't supposed to be
> corrected?
>
> What am I missing?
>
> I wasn't alerted by any of the recommended services I purchased to protect
> my disabled mom, my young son, his mother Sylvia, Sylvia new fiance, My
> sister who is a homicide detective, My uncle FV DiMarcello , the extended
> DiMarcello family, their knowledge of Nuclear physics and fiber optics
> etc.etc.
>
> .. I not only did what I was supposed to do to keep my license from being
> impersonated, I also alerted Senator Feinsteins Office because She and the
> city of SF are the clear Champions of ID Theft legislation, Homeless
> legislation, and SF is the world mecca of tech as we know it.
>
> And it's been acceptable for international criminals to Impersonate me and
> my license for two years?
>
> What am I missing?
>
> Clearly she had no idea or say in this matter and no one who understands
> her passion for these issues ever saw what I was reporting and fighting
> against. Nonetheless, despite all the obvious broken laws and ways that
> this office could have verified my ID Theft and stopped this much much
> sooner, you're still allowing the impersonation of my license by our
> countries enemies, after two years of letting it happen and not stopping it!
>
> What am I missing?
>
> 200-300 pieces of legislation championed by The Senator, she clearly put
> her Whole Life into this work, for the homeless and against ID Theft, and
> somehow her constituents couldn't and didn't help me stop this threat and
> these criminals? Do you know how inexpensive it was to help me stop this?
> I needed a room and a desk and a personal reference like your office to
> stop this. Do you think the senators legislation is really for victims that
> are suffering from misfortune that is nearly impossible for them to stop or
> for victims that are highly skilled and trained by the best in the world to
> protect this country and their responsibilities in holding such positions?
>
> Do you understand what I am saying?
>
> Do you really think the bottom line here is acceptable based on your words
> or unacceptable based on your actions?
>
> I am clearly missing something.
>
> I could not do this any differently no matter how much it hurt my son or
> my mom.
>
> I was trained to deal with this, licensed to protect the integrity of the
> futures markets, and I am finally able to ask the questions I have had
> since day 1 to a few parties I have had to let slide until I was able to
> protect the evidence and find appropriate witnesses just in case I was
> questioning the one with the piece I'm missing.
>
> This is not a joke. I am not randomly writing you at this time and I have
> no evidence to show that I have ever spoken to the senator or that any
> information was given to me by Senator Feinstein. I do not have any
> evidence she has ever known of my sensitive situation. And I do not believe
> for a second she would not have been able to instantly recognize and
> administer a very practical, timely and effective solution to stop the
> basic fallout and risks to our country.  I am not going to explain this any
> further and I am going to send another email and attach the good Senators
> work just to remind whoever is receiving my emails in her office that her
> logic and wisdom and selfless life long work to protect our country will be
> carried on indefinitely.
>
> The laws she championed to stop this attack will be carried out down to
> the letter of the legislation and the penalties as high as treason as
> outlined in her brand of justice will be sentenced if necessary.
>
> The Senator did not allow the impersonation and fraudulent use of my
> identity and license by international terrorists to thrive, or the
> possibility of such events, for two years and against virtually all of her
> lifes work. And I expect whoever is receiving my emails now and since the
> onset of this event will not attempt to ignore or further implicate The
> Good Senator, her office and her legacy in the tech capital of the world of
> such acts against our country and immediately execute a discreet and
> appropriate resolution that is aligned with The Senators prior and present
> legislation.  There's much more to do and this letter is being written to
> express a clear and present danger, from a Federally trained and licensed
> steward. And I am no longer lacking the understanding of these crimes and
> how to protect the inherent laws against anyone that is breaking them
> whether they are doing it with intent or inadvertently. So, I expect an
> answer and resolution immediately. If I was not clear in my communications
> before, please accept this email as my highest transparency possible and
> accept this letter as the total charter of this event which I will pass on
> for the first time to the next appropriate authorities if I suspect
> anything nefarious or damaging in your response or lack there of.
>
> Thank You for your time and patience in this matter.
>
> Anthony
>
> 144-80-3050
>

body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Feins, CaseWork (Feinstein) <CaseWork_Feins@feinstein.senate.gov>
Date: Thu, May 19, 2022, 12:38 PM
Subject: RE: Eviction Of Anthony DiMarcello III
To: A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com>


Dear Mr. DiMarcello:



I appreciate your patience in awaiting my reply.



In this email, I am happy to provide for you a statement which the agency
has provided to me for your use. I hope this response will be informative
to you.



Please inform me if there is anything I can do for you at this time. No
response to this message is required at this time.



“constituent is certifying on regular schedule. The PUA SEES can be
addressed when the department launches phase II for reconsideration of the
disqualification. The PUA SEES is not appealable.

”



Thanks,



Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant

San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein



*From:* A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com>
*Sent:* Sunday, May 15, 2022 3:52 AM
*To:* Dean Innocenzi <dazzidean@gmail.com>; Dean Innocenzi <
dazzidean@yahoo.com>; Elizabeth Petruccio <etp949609@gmail.com>; Feins,

*Subject:* Re: Eviction Of Anthony DiMarcello III



*Not a single response.*

Ok.

On July 1st I was informed I would be evicted on July 12th

On from July 1st to July 12th I was in touch with local representatives and
govt agencies and federal agencies with my complaints.



On July 12th I was told by local representatives that I would not be
evicted and I could stay until the end of my lease on sept 23, and I
informed them that not only did I sign up for every Covid rental relief
program I could find, but I was also waiting for my unemployment from my
layoff and I even paid Shea Apts for several months of full rent and they
got Covid rental RELEIF money from me.



Then in retaliation for complaining to the govt and federal agencies, Shea
Apts ordered a retaliatory eviction on me.  Good thing my son and my mom
weren’t home when the Shea property manager did a surprise, unposted, and
clearly illegal break in to my home with an armed force I wasn’t expecting,
and clearly they were mislead as well.



Luckily I have nerves of Steal even when I’m half naked and holding Kodiak
bear spray watching my door handle jiggle for 30 seconds from 25 ft. I had
to consider the safety of my friend who was a former Shea resident, and my
old neighbor, and who’s father is in the CIA, bc he was somewhere in my
apartment, so I had to gamble on the door opening first and not react
first.  Clearly I made the right choice. Also His father was not told of
this incident by us and we still aren’t sure if he knows.

We would rather not bring it up to him.



This is an ongoing crime since I first reported then breaking the law and
starting to attack me and my family and Harass us since April 23rd 2021. I
am still being attacked and others involved are being attacked. There are
people that depend on me that are suffering as well.



These criminals are making the good guys look like fools or worse is
intimidating y’all.



Big contractors in Orange County owe me 70k dollars on single projects from
three years ago.

I not only caught Covid being dedicated to my essential services duty and I
was also led to believe I would be protected for my risks and sacrifices to
the greater good. I’m happy with myself for that work, I didn’t need any
promises of hero pay or trophies to do what I did.



Clearly I wasn’t paid.



There’s a ton of money in luxury homes and technical design work I am still
waiting to get paid on.



Including my unemployment from my layoff since May.



The IRS and Child Support want me to be paid in full for obvious reasons
that I clearly have to spell out.



Child Support is supposed to be receiving their amount from unemployment
for my son and my court docs with them clearly state I am worth 8k a month
and can’t make less.



IRS is waiting for the high taxes I love paying for the amazing life I have
been living with my son in Orange County. I grew up in Trenton NJ and you
will never understand how happy and grateful I am to live here successfully
and watch my son grow up here, instead of where I grew up. The high taxes
are well worth it and I always have paid them. And this fiasco is stopping
that and creating obvious tax fraud and stopping me from paying my taxes.



I have some requests and suggestions to end my hardship and attacks.



Release my unemployment from May 2021 when I was laid off



Or send me the equivalent of that amount from the Victims compensation
board for these obvious crimes and attacks that are literally ongoing.



And that’s it. That’s all I need y’all to do.



Then I’ll be able to secure my son, secure my mom from Mexico to get her
back to her medical treatment, secure myself and I will easily stop these
criminals attacking me.



And then I’ll make sure my partner Dean and his dog Tech are secured. And
we will go from custom coastal spec house to house in my massive portfolio
and collect the money I’m owed and the blueprints so EDD can get my
accurate work history.



And I’ll do it legally. Like a real patriot and lead by example to show
other Americans and my son, who is my sole responsibility to make sure he
never does anything illegal and greedy that hurts anyone, but I will
happily go beyond him if I can. There’s laws now for anyone owing me over
1k dollars, I can handle filing all that. And these criminals all have a
paper trail through me. I can handle pursing them legally. Y’all don’t have
to do that part.  If this keeps up I’ll have plenty of support from other
Americans that will be happy to help keep our freedoms alive. Ive been
trained by the best, I can assure you that. Just get me my resources I
worked hard and honestly for and I can clearly, legally, transparently and
most important,

morally protect myself and others.



The budget is huge, the govt is fine, and I need my resources to make sure
these criminals no longer attack me or manipulate the effective local govt
that my high taxes and my design skills helped pay for, especially when it
comes to budget surpluses and my influence on the tons of luxury homes I
designed over the years.  I was strategically at the top of my career and
at the beginning of quite a big run business wise once I could move on
after my layoff and release my full portfolio.



I am not a criminal, I have no criminal record, I won’t commit any crimes,
and it would be wise to stop treating me like a criminal. I also have a
background in media and production and my story is way beyond Forest Gump
levels and well documented, I don’t want to have to go there to get
resources to end this obvious attack and active crimes.



If I have to be homeless and insecure for a year and out here in the
streets also working on this investigation. And I have to keep close to my
son to protect him bc of obvious retaliation.  like last time when I
reached out to govt officials and complained about Shea Properties
attacking me.  That resulted in a dangerous surprise ambush.



So if I have to do all that work this late on a Saturday night, and while
I’m homeless, then y’all gotta be up with the rest of us honest workers and
putting in time too.



My resume is below.  I do much more than what’s listed at a professional
level and I help little old ladies survive pandemics.



Thank you for your time and efforts in this serious and dangerous matter.
I’m not in crisis or beyond my own logic emotionally or in some sort of
uncontrolled state either.  I am working with the guidance of officials the
best I can for a year. I have been surviving and protecting from the attack
mentioned with the best of my abilities, knowledge, experience and morals.

All I can do is be calm, have faith, report to y’all what’s going on like I
have been for a year and make my humble requests.  If I’m in a state of
crisis and not my usual state of stoicism, I’ll def call 911.



Sincerely,

Anthony Michael DiMarcello III

Email responses only, thank you.



https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RGypBnX49XqixXHDbs2fqSas_ZoqZNu-





https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tFzOLJqbYS5mKakXsW5JWuM3nfb9uygc/view?usp=drivesdk







On Fri, May 13, 2022 at 11:56 PM A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com> wrote:

Hi!



Wow, y’all almost made it past Friday 13th. Timing truly is everything.



I am going to request that Local and Federal officials  go after Shea
Properties and Atlas Cabinets for their fraud against my son, myself, and
the local and federal govt. I am also requesting emergency victim
restitution immediately so that I may secure my son and myself. We have
been insecure for our safety for almost a year now since these attacks
started.



And make sure you call my partner Dean, who can verify past employer and
verify the attacks on myself and on him for our intellectual property and
control of our massive design portfolio here in Orange County.



Dean

1 (609) 665-5969



DEAN NEEDS TO BE SECURED AND BROUGHT TO CALIFORNIA IMMEDIATELY



AND MAKE SURE YOU GET OUR DOG TO DEAN IMMEDIATELY





THANK YOU FOR YOUR HELP,



Anthony Michael DiMarcello III

PLEASE EMAIL RESPONSES ONLY



PS



Trump and his son used to leave me voicemails back in 2012 when I had my
trading school, but I was too young to understand why he was interested in
my fintech and never responded. Also I had to beg my sons mom to go to
Tesla and bring talent there to get the Model 3 out before the deadlines,
which she did help personally make happen. So, I guess this is a good way
to reach back to them for the first time.









On Fri, Aug 20, 2021 at 12:51 PM A. DiMarcello <amd949609@gmail.com> wrote:

Hello my fellow Irvine representatives,



TGIF I hope you’re all having a great day so far. I myself a little tired
but I do feel good about the direction the situation is going. Today I
filed the paperwork that would allow me to submit my back up of the missing
COVID declaration.



From the beginning I was told that the clock had run out on submitting that
missing paperwork, even though the funds were already delivered.
Fortunately for all, there was a way for the courts to reinstate the
program at any point and I took the time to file those documents so we can
get back to the agreements we originally wanted and signed.



The agreements we have in place for the Covid program were only signed by
all because they were meant in good faith and it was a fair deal for
everyone.



No benefit could’ve been had by stopping the agreement as long as the
requirements of the agreement were fulfilled.



Personally, the agreements allowed me the needed wiggle room to continue my
business. I work in essential services including sanitation design. I have
been letting my suppliers and creditors amass large debts with me as I
loaned them my services. Being a single father and a caretaker to my mom,
on top of my demand, I also carried the burdens of my suppliers financial
issues to make sure they can survive and thrive with me as the pandemic
slows down and to everyone’s delight becomes a shit stain in history. No
pun intended, considering.



My point is this. Even after all the unnecessary havoc and pain I have been
afflicted by not having my son until this lease is up, I am still looking
to reach across the table and extend my hand for the continuing of our fair
deal. For me, the deal allows me to quickly pay down a few large accounts
via consolidation and finally have the credit to properly run my in demand
business.



For you, I was planning on being a lifer here in Woodbridge’s 265 acres.
That residual alone and my attitude of being a raving fan of such an
amazing property are worth more than maybe you understand. But you do
understand I TALK ALOT. Lol

So, The deal was good for you too. Profit was never an issue.



You will see I filed the docs as we didn’t know there was anyway to save
the deal. And then there was. So we decided to continue it as it was in our
collective best interests.



I want to honor what I signed and I hope you would want to do the same.



I am a hard working Roman American and a father. I can assure you I do care
very much about the values and morals I was raised with and how my son
needs me to lead by example, especially in tough situations.  Right now in
our country, petty cash should not be the focus. We do need more fair deals
and teamwork more than ever before. Our kids and communities depend on it.
And I will not let my son down.



Now I’m sure you only really Want me to talk about exactly what is an
apartment. The elephant in the room.  Considering I’m the one who’s going
to lose everything you have a trashed if this doesn’t work out I’m going to
take the time to talk about it. I am a very private person for reasons that
I think you may understand more now. I have a responsibility to be
discreet. The intellectual property and fiduciary Aspects of my work Will
no longer be secret valid or niche if I do not get back to my place today
so what’s the difference telling you all since you’ll see it anyway If
that’s the case.



In a loose chronological and value oriented order, the last being the most
recent and valuable, here it is.



From 16 years old to 22 years old, I had my own record label, I produced
hundreds of shows hundreds of songs and that’s all in there including the
business model itself.



From 23 to 26 I worked as a full-time commodities broker. Since 23 until
now, I’ve been developing trading algorithms on a professional level and I
continue to do so the state to this day recently I have actually updated
them for sports something that one’s ever done before with a OHLC chart.

Many famous people have used my software I had a school in fashion Island
for my software‘s I taught people around the world how to trade using my
algorithmic software‘s. All of that is in there. I still have clients that
I need to regularly tune they will lose that benefit if I lose my apt



From 26 to 28 my friend and I had a successful magazine in Orange County.
You may have heard of it, it was called Amerikidz. What you might not know
it was a free magazine and we managed over 4 million distributed copies
because I developed a way to simultaneously market fund and distribute the
magazine by trading SCO and website design for the expensive exclusive
printed ad space of my designs.

That entire business model and all of the original copies are in there



I worked on developing Gold and precious metal systems for brokerages in
Southern California around the world all of that is in there



My pattents with partners are in there



My design company for homes along the coast of Orange County is in there. I
targeted only homes that are worth over $2 million my family has been in
construction for 70 years my cell systems are generating $1 million in
sales a year For local cabinet shops and developers and all of them I have
loaned my time for their debt to get through this tough and exhausting
 pandemic.



My design system and my sales systems, unbeknownst to any of my competitors
Is is solely ran by me, just me. Because I’ve automated them. Each system
does the work of about five workers per day, per system.  No one knows one
person designed for hunter Holmes in three years of that kind of quality in
luxury and detail.



Well now you do.



Also my design systems are evolving to the point where they are showing me
simulation at a level that exposes many many costly mistakes by architects
and Interior designers using auto cad and passing the damages onto their
investor. That investor does not know this is happening and I’ve been
starting to compile for all of my clients exactly the kind of damages they
have paid for. This is a serious fiduciary problem and covers all
developers commercial residential etc.



Of course all of their home plans and a lot of personal information of my
affluent and international clientele Is in there. Even voicemails from
President Trump I am not kidding he liked the trading system,

This is all in there my life’s work



And here’s the most important thing in there my sons my moms and my own
personal belongings peace of mind and comfort being together during such a
tumultuous time especially because I’m not exactly unsuccessful I’ve simply
been put into quite a bind between the loans between this rental situation
it has been very difficult but at least we all had each other when things
weren’t very easy and now we’re going to apparently it was everything if we
can’t make and continue our fair deal which I have done everything possible
to continue and save as I am right now.



Thank you to the police department of Irvine and the sheriffs for their
professionalism during this situation and for woodbridge in the Manager is
trying to figure something out it is a rare and unknown known real estate
scenario and I think we all learned a lot hopefully in ways they can help
our community if they are in need which is the point of these agreements
they helped me help people get comfortable in their home you have to have
sanitation and clean Bathrooms and kitchens in a pandemic and that’s what I
was trusted with and I’ve done that job nonstop. And I enjoyed because it
helped many people



Please consider what I filed please let me back in to my home today and
please let me stay until my lease is up at the end of September and I will
happily pay off the remainder of the rent that is owed and maybe I may be
able to consider staying on track in Woodbridge as I expected to do before
this happened



Thank you again for your patience especially considering my long winded
ness. I would appreciate having the weekend with my son I have not got to
see how much it is really the only thing I do care about money as you can
clearly see is not the focus of my passions that place was for my mom and
my son and since April it has been on the have and I do not want them there
maybe I can have them there a little bit now but I will be clearing and
organizing as if I will be leaving at the end of my lease which I’m sure
you can understand why. And I will honor the agreement I signed



Sincerely



Anthony Michael DiMarcello III

949-278-9051

Ok.

On July 1st I was informed I would be evicted on July 12th

Clearly I made the right choice. Also His father was not told of this incident by us and we still aren’t sure if he knows.

We would rather not bring it up to him.



This is an ongoing crime since I first reported then breaking the law and starting to attack me and my family and Harass us since April 23rd 2021. I am still being attacked and others involved are being attacked. There are people that depend on me that are suffering as well.



These criminals are making the good guys look like fools or worse is intimidating y’all.



Big contractors in Orange County owe me 70k dollars on single projects from three years ago.

I not only caught Covid being dedicated to my essential services duty and I was also led to believe I would be protected for my risks and sacrifices to the greater good. I’m happy with myself for that work, I didn’t need any promises of hero pay or trophies to do what I did.

There’s a ton of money in luxury homes and technical design work I am still waiting to get paid on.



Including my unemployment from my layoff since May.



The IRS and Child Support want me to be paid in full for obvious reasons that I clearly have to spell out.

I grew up in Trenton NJ and you will never understand how happy and grateful I am to live here successfully and watch my son grow up here, instead of where I grew up. The high taxes are well worth it and I always have paid them. And this fiasco is stopping that and creating obvious tax fraud and stopping me from paying my taxes.



I have some requests and suggestions to end my hardship and attacks.



Release my unemployment from May 2021 when I was laid off



Or send me the equivalent of that amount from the Victims compensation board for these obvious crimes and attacks that are literally ongoing.

Ive been trained by the best, I can assure you that. Just get me my resources I worked hard and honestly for and I can clearly, legally, transparently and most important,

The budget is huge, the govt is fine, and I need my resources to make sure these criminals no longer attack me or manipulate the effective local govt that my high taxes and my design skills helped pay for, especially when it comes to budget surpluses and my influence on the tons of luxury homes I designed over the years. Personally, the agreements allowed me the needed wiggle room to continue my business. I work in essential services including sanitation design. My point is this. For me, the deal allows me to quickly pay down a few large accounts via consolidation and finally have the credit to properly run my in demand business.

For you, I was planning on being a lifer here in Woodbridge’s 265 acres. That residual alone and my attitude of being a raving fan of such an amazing property are worth more than maybe you understand. But you do understand I TALK ALOT. Lol
So, The deal was good for you too. Profit was never an issue.

You will see I filed the docs as we didn’t know there was anyway to save the deal. And then there was. So we decided to continue it as it was in our collective best interests.

I want to honor what I signed and I hope you would want to do the same.

I am a hard working Roman American and a father. I can assure you I do care very much about the values and morals I was raised with and how my son needs me to lead by example, especially in tough situations.  Right now in our country, petty cash should not be the focus. We do need more fair deals and teamwork more than ever before. Our kids and communities depend on it. And I will not let my son down.

Now I’m sure you only really Want me to talk about exactly what is an apartment. The elephant in the room.  Considering I’m the one who’s going to lose everything you have a trashed if this doesn’t work out I’m going to take the time to talk about it. The intellectual property and fiduciary Aspects of my work Will no longer be secret valid or niche if I do not get back to my place today so what’s the difference telling you all since you’ll see it anyway If that’s the case.

Many famous people have used my software I had a school in fashion Island for my software‘s I taught people around the world how to trade using my algorithmic software‘s. All of that is in there. I still have clients that I need to regularly tune they will lose that benefit if I lose my apt

From 26 to 28 my friend and I had a successful magazine in Orange County. You may have heard of it, it was called Amerikidz. What you might not know it was a free magazine and we managed over 4 million distributed copies because I developed a way to simultaneously market fund and distribute the magazine by trading SCO and website design for the expensive exclusive printed ad space of my designs.
That entire business model and all of the original copies are in there

I worked on developing Gold and precious metal systems for brokerages in Southern California around the world all of that is in there

My pattents with partners are in there

My design company for homes along the coast of Orange County is in there. I targeted only homes that are worth over $2 million my family has been in construction for 70 years my cell systems are generating $1 million in sales a year For local cabinet shops and developers and all of them I have loaned my time for their debt to get through this tough and exhausting  pandemic.

My design system and my sales systems, unbeknownst to any of my competitors Is is solely ran by me, just me. Because I’ve automated them. Each system does the work of about five workers per day, per system.  No one knows one person designed for hunter Holmes in three years of that kind of quality in luxury and detail.

Well now you do.

Also my design systems are evolving to the point where they are showing me simulation at a level that exposes many many costly mistakes by architects and Interior designers using auto cad and passing the damages onto their investor. That investor does not know this is happening and I’ve been starting to compile for all of my clients exactly the kind of damages they have paid for. This is a serious fiduciary problem and covers all developers commercial residential etc.

Of course all of their home plans and a lot of personal information of my affluent and international clientele Is in there. Even voicemails from President Trump I am not kidding he liked the trading system,
This is all in there my life’s work

And here’s the most important thing in there my sons my moms and my own personal belongings peace of mind and comfort being together during such a tumultuous time especially because I’m not exactly unsuccessful I’ve simply been put into quite a bind between the loans between this rental situation it has been very difficult but at least we all had each other when things weren’t very easy and now we’re going to apparently it was everything if we can’t make and continue our fair deal which I have done everything possible to continue and save as I am right now.

subject: Treasury Maintains Pressure on Houthi Illicit Shipping and Finance Schemes
snippet: *Treasury Building Engraving*  *U.S. Department of the Treasury*  Office of Public Affairs    *Press Release: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE*  July 18, 2024    *Contact:*           Treasury Public Affairs; Press@Treasury.gov *    *  *Treasury Maintains Pressure on Houthi Illicit Shipping and
body:
*Treasury Building Engraving*

*U.S. Department of the Treasury*

Office of Public Affairs



*Press Release: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE*

July 18, 2024



*Contact:*           Treasury Public Affairs; Press@Treasury.gov *    *

*Treasury Maintains Pressure on Houthi Illicit Shipping and Finance Schemes*

WASHINGTON  Today, the U.S. Department of the Treasurys Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) is designating and identifying as blocked property a dozen persons and vessels, respectively, that have played a critical role in financing the Houthis destabilizing regional activities as part of the network of Said al-Jamal. Todays action includes Indonesia-based Malaysian and Singaporean national Mohammad Roslan Bin Ahmad and Peoples Republic of China (PRC)-based Chinese national Zhuang Liang, who have facilitated illicit shipments and engaged in money laundering for the network. Said al-Jamals network continues to provide tens of millions of dollars in revenue to the Houthis in Yemen through its shipment of Iranian commodities, including oil, a funding stream underpinning the Houthis ongoing attacks against commercial shipping in the Red Sea. This action targets numerous aspects of this illicit network across the spectrum of its operations, from clients and facilitators to insurance providers, vessels, and ship management firms. 

Todays action underscores our focus on disrupting the Houthis sprawling network of financial facilitators, shell companies, and vessels, that enables the primary source of funding for the groups destabilizing activities, said Under Secretary of the Treasury for Terrorism and Financial Intelligence Brian Nelson. Treasury will continue disrupt the actors who are critical to this networks operations, as well as the Houthis ability to further destabilize the region and threaten international commerce.

Todays action is being taken pursuant to the counterterrorism authority Executive Order (E.O.) 13224, as amended. OFAC designated Said al-Jamal pursuant to E.O. 13224, as amended, on June 10, 2021 [ https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/jy0221 ], for having materially assisted, sponsored, or provided financial, material, or technological support for, or goods or services to or in support of, Irans Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps  Qods Force (IRGC-QF). The IRGC-QF was designated pursuant to E.O. 13224 on October 25, 2007 [ https://2001-2009.state.gov/r/pa/prs/ps/2007/oct/94193.htm ], for providing support to multiple terrorist groups. The U.S. Department of States designation of Ansarallah (commonly known as the Houthis) as a Specially Designated Global Terrorist group, pursuant to E.O. 13224, as amended, became effective on February 16, 2024.

*KEY INTERNATIONAL ILLICIT FINANCE AND SHIPPING FACILITATORS *

Malaysian and Singaporean national *Mohammad Roslan Bin Ahmad *(Royston), also known as Royston Wu Chiren or Mohammad Roslan Royston, is an Indonesia-based illicit shipment facilitator who provides ship management and brokering services for Said al-Jamals network. Royston has facilitated the Said al-Jamal networks shipments to Malaysia. Royston has also brokered vessels for illicit Russian and Venezuelan trade.

PRC-based businessman *Zhuang Liang* (*Zhuang*) has engaged in money laundering and other finance-related schemes for the Said al-Jamal network, including working with Said al-Jamal and the IRGC-QF to further Said al-Jamals illicit business operations. Zhuang has similarly assisted Said al-Jamal business partner and Houthi-affiliate Abdi Nasir Ali Mahamud (Mahamud) in circumventing sanctions by illicitly providing him access to the international financial system.

OFAC designated [ https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/jy0221 ] Mahamud concurrently with Said al-Jamal for having materially assisted, sponsored, or provided financial, material, or technological support for, or goods or services to or in support of, Said al-Jamal. Today, OFAC is updating Mahamuds entry on the Specially Designated Nationals and Blocked Persons List (SDN List) to reflect his use of a Somali diplomatic passport, D00015633, to travel internationally. Said al-Jamal has similarly traveled under the alias Ahmad Saeidi with Iran-issued passports U63475649 and E49297849, each of which is also being added to the SDN List today. 

Zhuang and Royston are being designated pursuant to E.O. 13224, as amended, for having materially assisted, sponsored, or provided financial, material, or technological support for, or goods or services to or in support of, Said al-Jamal. 

*ILLICIT SHIPPING NETWORK*

Said al-Jamals network relies on numerous, seemingly innocuous, companies in multiple jurisdictions to illicitly generate tens of millions of dollars of revenue. Seychelles- registered, Thailand and Singapore-based *Ascent General Insurance Company* has provided insurance to vessels that were identified as blocked property of those sanctioned for providing support to Said al-Jamal. United Arab Emirates (UAE)-based *Fornacis Energy Trading Co. L.L.C* has purchased and shipped tens of millions of dollars worth of Iranian cargo for the Said al-Jamal network.

Ascent General Insurance Company and Fornacis Energy Trading Co. L.L.C are being designated pursuant to E.O. 13224, as amended, for having materially assisted, sponsored, or provided financial, material, or technological support for, or goods or services to or in support of, Said al-Jamal. 

Marshall Islands-registered and UAE-based *Barco Ship Management Inc* (*Barco*) is the ship manager and commercial manager of multiple vessels, including the Panama-flagged *WANJI *(IMO: 9215103), which has been utilized by Said al-Jamals network for illicit shipments to the UAE worth tens of millions of dollars. Barco additionally manages and operates the Panama-flagged vessel *OCEANIC II *(IMO: 9275995) and the Panama-flagged vessel *TIREX* (IMO: 9203772). Like Barco, the Marshall Islands-registered *Sea Knot Shipping Inc.* has used the vessel *MIROVA DYNAMIC *(IMO: 9237618) to transport illicit shipments worth tens of millions of dollars for Said al-Jamal. 

Barco and Sea Knot Shipping Inc. are being designated pursuant to E.O. 13224, as amended, for having materially assisted, sponsored, or provided financial, material, or technological support for, or goods or services to or in support of, Said al-Jamal. The WANJI, OCEANIC II, and TIREX are being identified as blocked property in which Barco has an interest. MIROVA DYNAMIC is being identified as blocked property in which Sea Knot Shipping Inc. has an interest. 

UAE-based *Alpha Shine Marine Services L.L.C* is the ship manager of the Panama-flagged vessel *KASPER *(IMO: 9293143), which has been used by the Said al-Jamal network to facilitate millions of dollars worth of illicit trade under forged shipping documents. 

Alpha Shine Marine Services L.L.C is being designated pursuant to E.O. 13224, as amended, for having materially assisted, sponsored, or provided financial, material, or technological support for, or goods or services to or in support of, Said al-Jamal. The KASPER is being identified as blocked property in which Alpha Shine Marine Services L.L.C has an interest. 

*SANCTIONS IMPLICATIONS*

As a result of todays action, all property and interests in property of the designated persons described above that are in the United States or in the possession or control of U.S. persons are blocked and must be reported to OFAC. In addition, any entities that are owned, directly or indirectly, individually or in the aggregate, 50 percent or more by one or more blocked persons are also blocked. Unless authorized by a general or specific license issued by OFAC, or exempt, OFACs regulations generally prohibit all transactions by U.S. persons or within (or transiting) the United States that involve any property or interests in property of designated or otherwise blocked persons. 

In addition, financial institutions and other persons that engage in certain transactions or activities with the sanctioned entities and individuals may expose themselves to sanctions or be subject to an enforcement action. The prohibitions include the making of any contribution or provision of funds, goods, or services by, to, or for the benefit of any designated person, or the receipt of any contribution or provision of funds, goods, or services from any such person. 

The power and integrity of OFAC sanctions derive not only from OFACs ability to designate and add persons to the SDN List, but also from its willingness to remove persons from the SDN List consistent with the law. The ultimate goal of sanctions is not to punish, but to bring about a positive change in behavior. For information concerning the process for seeking removal from an OFAC list, including the SDN List, please refer to OFACs Frequently Asked Question 897 here [ https://ofac.treasury.gov/faqs/897 ]. For detailed information on the process to submit a request for removal from an OFAC sanctions list, please click here [ https://ofac.treasury.gov/specially-designated-nationals-list-sdn-list/filing-a-petition-for-removal-from-an-ofac-list ].

Click here for more information on the individuals and entities designated and vessel identified today [ https://ofac.treasury.gov/recent-actions/20240718 ].

###

body:
To Senator Min and his office,

I have been doing a lot of soul searching and research regarding this
matter. And I have explicitly on multiple occasions contacted the
representatives you recommend. Over the years since this "attack" started I
have reached out to everyone possible. I want you to know two things. One.
Your office and the late Senator Feinstein are the only representatives
that have ever honestly replied to me and offered any assistance. And I am
not talking about Senator Feinsteins back office, I was lucky enough to
have one brief and enlightening conversation with her. She thanked me for
reaching out, pointed me to the work she has championed regarding the
homeless and ID Theft, and asked me to be patient and each back out in a
week. After that conversation a representative in her office using a fake
name,
Mr. Marshall Wu, took over contact with me and refused to put me back in
contact with Senator Feinstein. I feel the only other person I should
contact at this point is our city attorney, Michael Gates.

>

body:
Thank You Mr. Wu,

This is a serious and dangerous domino effect I cannot get from under. They
stole my home and my cars by committing crimes that I already reported and
used the courts to do it.

My car was paid for, I got the records despite chase and ally bank. One of
the charges revered was a month old. Yet they repo it. That’s stealing. And
my classic Jaguar literally hours after I got it from storage. Gone.

My home,
Shea Homes
I was in the rental RELEIF program for several months
I am a recipient of hero pay from work I was laid off from
The mayor and assembly people clearly said my eviction. On July 12th was off
Aug 4 -
8 armed sheriffs break down my door and raid my home and kick me out

They were Lead by the recently uncontested re-elected Sherrif Barnes
Relative of Paul Barnes,
Shea Homes President of San Diego

Under my care when they did this dangerous and surprise raid was someone
that’s father works for the CIA and DHS. I have no idea if his father
knows, we aren’t going to tell him. Y’all can do that. Let the Sherrif
explain to him why his sons anxiety and mental issues are getting worse bc
of this retaliatory eviction.

EDD
I’m the head of design and Millworks designer for some of the most
expensive coastal homes in Orange County. Don’t you think if all that work
was W2 over the years that EDD and IRS would already have that on file?
Why are you asking me as a homeless and clearly robbed person for documents
proving I’m an independent contractor or sole proprietor if that’s what I
already filed and is clearly obvious based on how EDD and that works?
Really? I am owed 100s of thousands of dollars from GC, Architects,
Investors, Home Owners. Why would EDD even need me to prove anything when
it has to be what I’m saying?

My hero pay
On May 18th I send in all info showing Shea homes and Shea Ventures
involvement into the Anaheim Angels Illegal Stadium sale.
Then the deal is shut down

On May25th someone walks into a bank with my typed, govt hero pay check,
impersonating me, and CASHES IT.

FYI

I’ve called all services and that’s why I am still talking to you since
Oct. Do you think I want to be homeless? I have officials and courts
illegally robbing me at gun point and you think me and my son are safe? I
still have stalkers from trying to be in a shelter for a few weeks.
So I camp on the beach.

NO ONE WILL HELP ME, no services in Orange County. No legal aid,
DFEH DELETED MY CASE WITHOUT NOTICE.

Do you know how many times I’ve almost died this year trying to survive on
the streets and put together these records?

I took an oath to help people and saved several lives this year.

I train in must

And you want me to walk into HB Police, without a lawyer, and ask them to
help me lol


I need a phone number to a

subject: URGENT: Federal Whistleblower Protection & Representation Request — Anthony DiMarcello — Active Retaliation, Physical Injury, 5-Year Documented Record
snippet: TO: U.S. Department of Justice — Corporate Whistleblower Unit / Civil Rights Division / HHS Office of Inspector General FROM: Anthony Michael DiMarcello III DATE: March 30, 2026 RE: Emergency Federal Whistleblower Protection Request — Documented 5-Year Record of Reporting, Agency Inaction, and
body:
TO: U.S. Department of Justice — Corporate Whistleblower Unit / Civil
Rights Division / HHS Office of Inspector General
FROM: Anthony Michael DiMarcello III
DATE: March 30, 2026
RE: Emergency Federal Whistleblower Protection Request — Documented 5-Year
Record of Reporting, Agency Inaction, and Ongoing Physical Retaliation

I am writing to formally request federal whistleblower protection and legal
representation. I am currently physically injured as a result of ongoing
retaliation for reporting systemic fraud, abuse of disabled adults, and
abuse of homeless children in Orange County, California. Local channels
have been exhausted and are compromised.

---

SECTION 1: WHO I AM AND WHAT I REPORTED

I am a relator and whistleblower who, beginning in August–September 2021,
began making formal reports to state and federal agencies regarding:

1. Disabled adults being confined and exploited at a Huntington Beach
facility operated under Mercy House / Navigation Center contracts funded by
public homeless funds.
2. Fraud against federal and state homeless assistance programs, including
LMIHAF funds and COVID-era housing relief.
3. The parallel reports of Dr. Ann Verma (annvermamd@gmail.com), a
board-certified psychiatrist, regarding abuse of homeless children in
Orange County group homes.

---

SECTION 2: VERIFIED REPORTING TIMELINE (Server-Verified Message IDs)

The following is a forensic chain of custody showing I reported this fraud
to federal and state agencies beginning in 2021. Each entry includes a
verifiable Gmail Message ID that can be subpoenaed from Google's servers to
confirm the exact date and content of each report.

DATE         | AGENCY CONTACTED                        | MESSAGE ID
      | SUBJECT / CONTENT
-------------|------------------------------------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------------
09/02/2021   | CA EDD DVBE Advocate                    | 17ba6c4bd7353896
      | Illegal eviction at gunpoint; disabled mother inside; fraud;
identity theft. State agency auto-confirmed receipt same day (ID:
17ba6c4e7aebdba3)
05/11/2022   | CA DFEH (Civil Rights)                  | 180b525faa81f4b7
      | Case #82945 filed. Agency confirmed receipt.
05/11/2022   | CA DFEH (Screenshots/Evidence)          | 180b5280f52189f5
      | Case #82947 filed. Agency confirmed receipt.
05/13/2022   | CA DOJ Housing Division                 | 180c11f2eab0e707
      | Detailed 14-point complaint re: COVID rental relief fraud, illegal
eviction, disabled victim, 16 photo attachments.
07/26/2022   | Senator Feinstein's Office (Marshall Wu) | 1822745e43ec2872
     | Active case file; Sen. Feinstein office acknowledged case; advised
me to contact local authorities (who are compromised).
08/04/2022   | Senator Feinstein's Office              | 1826c5d21ed805b3
      | Escalation; reported active harassment by Shea Homes associates
during contact.
12/31/2022   | CFTC Whistleblower Office               | 1856ab70f0b7cf91
      | Federal whistleblower tip filed. CFTC auto-response confirmed
receipt. No case opened, no follow-up.
01/11/2023   | National Whistleblower Center           | 185a28e304da0cb1
      | Outreach for legal assistance. NWC acknowledged receipt; provided
resource referral only. No representation secured.
04/03/2023   | OC District Attorney — Victims Rights   | 187490fb2d995931
      | Filed victim services inquiry. OCDA responded but stated they "do
not investigate" and referred back to law enforcement. (Law enforcement is
compromised in this matter.)
03/17/2026   | DOJ / White House Task Force            | 19cff39fdf50da9e
      | Full federal disclosure sent to vicepresident@whitehouse.gov,
CorporateWhistleblower@usdoj.gov, civilrights@usdoj.gov. Dr. Verma CC'd.

---

SECTION 3: THE PATTERN OF INACTION (Proof of Systemic Cover)

Every agency listed above received my reports. Not one opened a formal
investigation. The pattern is:
- State agencies: Auto-receipts issued, then silence.
- Federal agencies: Auto-receipts issued, then silence.
- OC District Attorney: Acknowledged, then redirected to law enforcement
(the same local system that conducted the illegal eviction).
- Senator Feinstein's office: Sympathized, then redirected to local
authorities.

This pattern of coordinated inaction, from the municipal level up through
state agencies, is itself evidence of the depth of the corruption I am
reporting.

---

SECTION 4: RETALIATION AND CURRENT PHYSICAL INJURY

Following my reports, I have suffered:
- Illegal forced eviction (August 4, 2021) — 5 armed sheriffs, no
paperwork, guns drawn, disabled mother and minor child inside the residence.
- Seizure of all assets (vehicles, property, business assets, intellectual
property).
- Identity theft and financial account manipulation.
- Sustained business destruction (gig economy deactivations, banking
account closures, income suppression).
- Physical injury sustained during the period of homelessness caused by
this retaliation.
- I am currently injured and unable to access local medical or legal
support due to the compromised nature of local institutions.

---

SECTION 5: CO-WHISTLEBLOWER — DR. ANN VERMA

Dr. Ann Verma (annvermamd@gmail.com) is a board-certified psychiatrist who
made parallel reports regarding abuse of homeless children in Orange County
group homes at the same time I was reporting abuse of disabled adults. Her
reports were also ignored. She is CC'd on this communication and can
corroborate the systemic nature of these reports.

---

SECTION 6: LEGAL BASIS FOR FEDERAL JURISDICTION

This matter involves:
- False Claims Act (31 U.S.C. §§ 3729–3733): Fraud against federal homeless
assistance funds.
- RICO (18 U.S.C. § 1961): Coordinated multi-party scheme using wire fraud,
financial institution fraud, and public corruption.
- Whistleblower Protection Act (5 U.S.C. § 2302): Documented retaliation
against a federal reporter.
- 42 U.S.C. § 1983 / State-Created Danger Doctrine: Agency inaction that
proximately caused continued harm to vulnerable victims and to me as the
reporter.

---

SECTION 7: IMMEDIATE REQUEST

I am requesting:
1. Assignment of a federal whistleblower attorney or DOJ contact for this
case.
2. Preservation of all records at the agencies listed above related to my
filings.
3. Federal protection from ongoing retaliation.
4. Acknowledgment of receipt of this communication with a case or tracking
number.

I am physically injured, without stable housing, and cannot access local
legal resources. This is an emergency.

Respectfully submitted,

Anthony Michael DiMarcello III
amd949609@gmail.com
714-587-8519
Former series 3 and real estate licenses
Local business owner
Huntington Beach, CA

Co-Whistleblower: Dr. Ann Verma, M.D. — annvermamd@gmail.com

>> appropriate resolution that is aligned with The Senators prior and present
>> legislation.  There's much more to do and this letter is being written to
>> express a clear and present danger, from a Federally trained and licensed
>> steward. And I am no longer lacking the understanding of these crimes and
>> how to protect the inherent laws against anyone that is breaking them
>> whether they are doing it with intent or inadvertently. So, I expect an
>> answer and resolution immediately. If I was not clear in my communications
>> before, please accept this email as my highest transparency possible and
>> accept this letter as the total charter of this event which I will pass on
>> for the first time to the next appropriate authorities if I suspect
>> anything nefarious or damaging in your response or lack there of.
>>
>> Thank You for your time and patience in this matter.
>>
>> Anthony
>>
>> 144-80-3050
>>
>

subject: Re: EDD
snippet: Thank You Mr. Wu,  I have had my acct verified several times last week that there was no fraud but that the acct EDD has is not my acct.  I have been in this process for a year since I have been laid off. I updated the Senators office last week that the acct is not mine, your office sent an edd
body:
Thank You Mr. Wu,

I have had my acct verified several times last week that there was no fraud
but that the acct EDD has is not my acct.  I have been in this process for
a year since I have been laid off. I updated the Senators office last week
that the acct is not mine, your office sent an edd rep that clearly was
prepared to do whatever it took to get me to accept the acct is mine, and I
denied. I reported back to you after, that was last week.
You told me then to call back regarding just that situation next weds,
tomorrow.
Now, mysteriously my food stamps is cutoff.
The only resource I have left.
I am in a hardship.
So I am forced to call the EDD rep you sent me an accept whatever her offer
was, which wasn’t regarding my acct.

Our scheduled meeting regarding the EDD rep is tomorrow.  My birthday.
I was reminded of my birthday by the CONTRACTED ebt food stamp case worker
doing research and was the only person calling me this week. Her file has
my Birthday correct, but no other details. She promised like everyone else
to get me out of this before it gets worse.  And she promised she has the
details I gave her and they won’t be lost. Right.

It’s been a year since my layoff and I filed my unemployment claim.

EDD still has not sent me my UI from that claim.

My uncle is in a coma from a life threatening car accident that happened
last week, and if he does make it through and wake up, he may be paralyzed.
My family is distraught and I cannot focus on that bc I am waiting for MY
ENTIRE LIFE AND CAREER TO POTENTIALLY BE RESTORED BC I AM IN A HARDSHIP.

If EDD can just offer me whatever they like, how about they just offer me
my unemployment I filed for  from when I was laid off last year in May.

Thank you for your offices time and help with this.

When my family members that are officers are available again, bc they are
clearly with our uncle,
I will be able to inform them of what’s going on and see if they can be of
assistance. But as usual, like for the last year, I’m waiting to survive
and all of this has been completely out of my hands.

Anthony


On Tue, May 3, 2022 at 5:31 PM Wu, Marshall (Feinstein) <
Marshall_Wu@feinstein.senate.gov> wrote:

> Dear Mr. DiMarcello:
>
>
>
> Thank you for keeping me updated.
>
>
>
> I’m continuing to seek an update or elaboration on your situation from
> EDD, please wait for that.
>
>
>
> Can you please comment on the claim which is currently valid for you and
> what the payout from EDD is and its status?
>
>
>
> Thanks,
>
>
>
> Marshall Wu | Staff Assistant
>
> San Francisco | Office of U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein
>
>
>

subject: Re: EDD
snippet: Ya know bc I’m basically going to starve in a hardship unless now I call EDD and do whatever they say so I can get some money and eat.  I’ve been part of the coastal community for a long time and worked with a lot of prominent people here on a personal level.  My reputation and career are inte
body:
Ya know bc I’m basically going to starve in a hardship unless now I call
EDD and do whatever they say so I can get some money and eat.

I’ve been part of the coastal community for a long time and worked with a
lot of prominent people here on a personal level.

My reputation and career are intertwined, I cannot even entertain any work
bc of this situation. The few associates in this community that I was not
able to hide this from have lent me money over the year and resources and
are promising to keep this private,
They have been following along for me to pay them back and their interest
in this has evolved to be much more attentive as this gets worse and worse.

I have paid quite the price to be discreet and follow EDD and ID.me through
this process over the last year.

Please have this matter cleared up and my unemployment released asap before
this gets worse and so I can begin to slowly piece my life and career back
together. And also figure out what exactly is going on here, bc no one
seems to understand the events over the last year and my sons security and
mine is clearly at risk. This is an urgent matter.

Anthony
